description: Calibration Fleet -- universal IC-calibration loop. For every signal engine in the registry, fits Spearman rank IC vs 21-session forward SPY drawdown. Publishes per-engine IC + weight proposals to data/calibration-fleet.json + SSM.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Calibration Fleet - daily 09:10 UTC. Daily cadence accumulates the per-engine history; the IC fit re-runs on every invocation.
